Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0ECA "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Souls of Darkon.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0490 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Souls of Darkon.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note: as the screen RAM for the loading image originally located at $C800 is overwritten during the loading of the game, it was moved to $D000 inside the dump file instead.
